mapper.select: SELECT NOTICE_ID, TITLE, WRITER_ID, VIEWS, CREATED_AT FROM NOTICE ORDER BY NOTICE_ID DESC LIMIT ${index}, ${amount}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NOTICE (TITLE, CONTENT, WRITER_ID, CREATED_AT) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{writer_id}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE NOTICE SET VIEWS = VIEWS + 1 WHERE NOTICE_ID = #{notice_id}
UPDATE NOTICE SET TITLE = #{title}, CONTENT = #{content}, UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE NOTICE_ID = #{notice_id}
